data.body: WS4 (rife-feint-canal) LANDED: commit 47307af01. p6_ac_quality verify-command lint (3 defect classes: file-inspection-no-assertion / unanchored-grep / unquoted-metachar; fail-open abstain into coverage counts); DET_CHECKS stays P1-P9; shellcheck cited. Closed both attestations. 7/11 (WS1,6,7,2,3,11,4). Next: WS5 rubric enrichments (E6/T3/G3/T5c/T11/E2/G4, PROMPT-ONLY per AC2 git-diff-only-reviewers).
